<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\Filesystem\Exception; /** * IOException interface for file and input/output stream related exceptions thrown by the component. * * @author Christian Gärtner <christiangaertner.film@googlemail.com> */ interface IOExceptionInterface extends ExceptionInterface { /** * Returns the associated path for the exception. */ public function getPath(): ?string; }
